Operation 'Predict' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no summary or description, making it impossible for AI agents to understand its purpose. Added clear action-oriented summary explaining the prediction request flow. Description now specifies: the input schema (SeldonMessage), required path parameters (namespace, deployment), expected output format (SeldonMessage with predictions), and the operation's role in the Seldon deployment workflow. This enables AI agents to determine when to use this operation for inference tasks.

data.summary_suggestion: Send prediction request to deployed model
data.description_suggestion: Submits a SeldonMessage containing input data to a deployed Seldon model for inference. The request must include the namespace and deployment identifiers in the path. Returns a SeldonMessage containing the model's predictions, including output tensors or data and optional metadata. This is the primary operation for obtaining predictions from a deployed machine learning model.

message: Operation 'SendFeedback' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no summary or description, creating ambiguity about its purpose and usage. Added action-oriented summary clarifying the feedback submission intent. Description now explains: the input schema (Feedback object), required path parameters, expected response, and critically, the side effects and purpose (performance monitoring, retraining, online learning). This helps AI agents understand when feedback submission is appropriate and how it integrates with the model lifecycle.

data.description_suggestion: Submits feedback data for a previous prediction to the deployed Seldon model. The Feedback object should contain the prediction reference, actual outcome, and any associated metrics. Required path parameters are namespace and deployment identifiers. Returns a 200 status on successful submission. Feedback is used to monitor model performance, enable model retraining, and support online learning workflows.
